creator: iss081@bangor.ac.uk
text:
After an install, the file /usr/share/misc/termcap.db is not created. 
This problem goes unnoticed on reasonably capable machines but on low
spec PCs there is a noticeable delay when executing commands like more
and vi which need to understand the terminal's capabilities.

Fix: 

The command 

cap_mkdb /usr/share/misc/termcap

will create the required file but perhaps it's just missing from the
install set?
How-To-Repeat: 
Any fresh install will display the problem.
